mapper.select: SELECT id as id, dealerId as dealerId, (select dealerName from dealer where id = dealerId) as dealerName, productId as productId, (select productName from product_config where id = productId) as productName, orderDate as orderDate, quantity as quantity, price as price, totalAmount as totalAmount, marketFee as marketFee, expectRate as expectRate FROM sale_order LIMIT #{start}, #{pageSize}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sale_order (dealerId, productId, orderDate, quantity, price, totalAmount, marketFee, expectRate ) VALUES( #{dealerId}, #{productId}, #{orderDate}, #{quantity}, #{price}, #{totalAmount}, #{marketFee}, #{expectRate} )
mapper.update: UPDATE sale_order SET dealerId=#{dealerId}, productId=#{productId}, orderDate=#{orderDate}, quantity=#{quantity}, price=#{price}, totalAmount=#{totalAmount}, marketFee=#{marketFee}, expectRate=#{expectRate} WHERE id=#{id}
